sigWerErrors.reason: 'sao kê' means 'statement' (as in bank statement), while 'sau khi' means 'after'. This changes the meaning of the sentence significantly.
'có chuyện gấp' means 'have an urgent matter', while 'phải chuyển cấp' means 'must transfer level'. This changes the meaning of the sentence significantly.
